name_cn:
In stock!!️
New Dior Voyage bag, so cool! The new shape is full of sporty vibes and an irresistible sense of luxury. Vintage waxed leather paired with classic letter hardware creates an effortless chic look. With an adjustable shoulder strap, it handles various carrying styles with ease. Full of design details and a huge capacity, it is a must-have item for sports and outings.
size: 23*15*9.5cm
